sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58132" key="knhko/puros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κνηκό-πῡρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n58132.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of yellow wheat</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡδοναὶ τραγημάτων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1682.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sopat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
